name: RocketChat
description: Connect Clawdbot to RocketChat via webhook integration

botAuthToken.description: Bot user auth token (from RocketChat Personal Access Token)

incomingWebhookUrl.description: RocketChat Incoming Webhook URL for sending bot replies (alternative to botAuthToken/botUserId)

webhookSecret.description: Secret token to validate incoming webhooks from RocketChat

allowFrom.description: Allowed RocketChat usernames that can message the bot
